case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TAUFETEE, TAUMAOE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TAUFETEE, TAUMAOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAUFETEE, TAUMAOE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-15-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAUFETEE, TAUMAOE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,030.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
